projects.title: Global Development Dashboard
projects.description: Engineering a cloud data pipeline that automatically fetches, cleans, structures, and stores global development data from live data feeds (UN SDGs, ND-GAIN, World Bank) that is visualized on a public interactive dashboard.
tags: Azur (Blob Storage, Logic Apps, Container Instances)

projects.title: Asynchronous Federated Learning Network
projects.description: Engineering an optimized federated learning network for distributed IoT healthcare settings using an asynchronous layer-wise parameter update scheduler implemented with PyTorch and Flower.

projects.title: westernsalesclub.ca
projects.description: The website for Western's first sales club paired with backend content management dashboard allowing club executives to authenticate and manage the website's content.
